name: create_doc
description: Create a new Google Doc in the operator's Google Drive, optionally seeded with initial text. Returns the document_id (use it with read_doc / docs_batch_update) and a shareable edit URL.

text.description: Optional initial body text to insert at the start of the document.

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

returns: JSON with document_id, title, and a docs.google.com edit url (or an error string).
notes: Requires Google Workspace connected for the operator (Docs scope granted by the Google sign-in in onboarding). For richer formatting after creation, follow up with docs_batch_update.
